message:
🐛 fix: move FAB outside overflow-x-hidden to prevent viewport clipping (#8464) (#8477)

The FloatingDashboardActions FAB, DashboardCustomizer, and ConfigureCardModal
were rendered inside a div with overflow-x-hidden. When any ancestor in the
chain has a CSS property that creates a new containing block (transform,
perspective, will-change, filter, contain), position:fixed children get
clipped by the overflow boundary. Moving these fixed-position elements
outside the overflow wrapper ensures they render relative to the viewport.

Fixes #8464

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
